加油[码住]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712240501,"group_id":"7346909068407098430","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"赶快更新啊！各位太太们","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N64GfZ8/XyshXScS0RXTRD0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3659150529794dd2bb3fbc3be8d01b36~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707543&x-signature=LCDc%2BQkc8vEiaYSpUd6LOfBrzVg%3D","user_id":"111023629316","user_name":"不芒芒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111023629316","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1726106810,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":16,"name":"423读书日","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c7865e1c9cc3ce8d4613e7f52dc0fd34","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/421c11bb754900f4bca176159b2e320a"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7346909068407098430","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世x囤粮x双洁x甜宠x小丧尸女主x超A输出狂魔男主】
暴雨，台风，海啸，雷暴，地磁消失，丧尸，怪物，异能，等等等等……
恭喜各位打开末世主线，全世界大洗牌，接下来的求生路，靠命，靠运气，靠自己。
-
而在别人还在疯狂尖叫的时候，作为生存狂魔的许多多已经吭哧吭哧地囤满了粮仓！
什么肉蛋奶，什么各种罐头干粮，什么武器各类工具。
千面魔方空间在手，所有物资通通打包全部带走！
只是——为什么万事俱备的她开场就直接变成了阿巴阿巴的小丧尸啊喂！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/36b2d4519fd56c61bda96ab71636a435","author":"岁安呀","author_id":"","book_id":"7346909068407098430","book_name":"糟糕！小丧尸一不小心就成了大佬","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0e0f8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7346909623644865086","read_count":"132832","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1118886"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"534","tags":"科幻末世,空间,末世,囤物资","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2d2c0e8b83ea7daccdd44ec65df77bdb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316319&x-signature=f%2Fyp1J8nxb9DGuMIpYclaK%2Bg5PA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1887181906118461","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322063159D835A2B4C2A38AF930A2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":119,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5562,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":92920},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1712242064,"author_reply_time":1712242081,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7360583182512423742","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"幸好刷到这本书的时候点开看了。它的脑洞相比较之前看的末世文还瞒新颖有趣的。不是重生、穿越，没有前任渣男、女，没有极品家人、也没有雌竞。
女主末世爆发后开局就成了丧尸，手握魔方🈳间升级后全能。爱好囤囤囤。性格啥的真嘟超级可爱ớ ₃ờ，在基地异化者中是唯一只小丧尸“宝宝”。  男主帅野痞型，一点都不拉胯，人设很棒。初中时就对小班长有好感队友们都知道，每次被调侃还会脸红，会自我攻略。就喜欢逗他的小班长。他俩互动真的超有爱[爱心]。  3A小队也很绝，实力强还护短。几个大老爷们会给小尸尸买首饰、小裙子、好吃的…每次都会夸夸夸，一整个情绪价值拉满。。。    他们所在基地在末世中真的是个很理想化的存在，工作人员，研究员啥的都很和善很温暖，“我们绝不向末日妥协，绝不放弃任何一位人类。”所以哪怕是那些异化者只要还有人类意识都会尽力去帮他们正常生活。
真心不错，，值得看看👀 加油加油✊努力更文。。推荐👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713773247,"group_id":"7346909068407098430","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5LV8MG8aLDTk7sy5HdiQ9s=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ad13c4ba421145c09a5e716536095946~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703301&x-signature=lGsrtQcjlXGZePBPfC6K9JcNpro%3D","user_id":"104714038864","user_name":"上等~佳酿小五花"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104714038864","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7346909068407098430","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世x囤粮x双洁x甜宠x小丧尸女主x超A输出狂魔男主】
